channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 17th April
item.description:
Cway edge deterioration Stat plan required 3900mmx330mmx65mm Road closure TM required (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 17th April
item.description:
CW pothole 600mm x 500mm x 42mm Stop and go TM Junction of Fieldgate Road (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 17th April
item.description:
Cway pothole Stat plan required 340mmx280mmx58mm Road closure TM required 2nsd (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 17th April
item.description:
Severn Trent works - there is no access for patrons, cars are mounting the pavement constantly where a fence has been installed during the roadworks - cars are using other side of road. Caller also reports that no contractors are on site whilst the road closure is in place
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 17th April
item.description:
CW pothole 700mm x 300mm x 42mm Give and take TM Outside number 50 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 17th April
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 17th April
item.description:
CW pothole 600mm x 600mm x 40mm Give and take TM School Entrance (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 17th April
item.description:
Cway pothole 950mmx800mmx65mm Road closure TM required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 17th April
item.description:
Cway pothole 1100mmx600mmx55mm 3way traffic lights TM required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking outside Post Office causing congestion, 17th April
item.description:
The one or two cars that park outside the post office cause huge tailbacks along Hatherley Road. The road is too narrow for two cars to pass the parked cars. Cars should park elsewhere or halfway on wide car park to keep the traffic flowing. Go there any weekday morning or from 17:20 and you will see the problems it causes.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 238, Hatherley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight on hermitage street making buzzing noise when on at night, 17th April
item.description:
Streetlight on hermitage street outside the back of 38 Francis street is making audible buzzing noise at night. This is causing a disturbance. A component of this light may need replacing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Francis Street, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long area of potholes, 17th April
item.description:
Section 56 of the 1980 Highways Act , this area in Church Road Longlevens has been damaged and let’s. be honest dangerous for more than the six months allocated time stated in the Highways Act I think you have a duty of care to fix this ASAP, is this not the case ???
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Church Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long strip of tarmac missing when going round the roundabout traveling from the southeast, 17th April
item.description:
Please see image

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): C&G Roundabout, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: It's a really big pothole, 17th April
item.description:
Pothole in the road, please see image

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Delta Way, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury

item.title: 35-59 Hucclecote Road, GL3 3TL, 17th April
item.description:
Overflowing dumped wheelie bin with no wheels, with more and more being dumped on and around it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)
